notes: The four original historical case corpora remain the current verified scored working corpus: rights-reviewed, acquired, normalized, segmented, verified, and JSON-valid. The pre-v1 expansion window has added fr-rev as a draft French-source corpus with manifest, raw text, normalized text, segmentation, and MIPVU worklists, but no reviewed annotations, support rating, or reliability sample yet. All four original cases have Codex-assisted first-pass MIPVU lexical decisions. Lincoln has complete model-reliability artifacts and designed human-reliability cohorts, but required human coder submissions are not complete. American Revolution, Napoleon, Hitler, and fr-rev model and human reliability workflows remain absent or incomplete. Expansion work is tracked in GitHub milestone 7 and issue #174; any additional new cases or documents require selection rationale, rights/provenance review, manifest registration, pipeline processing, annotation-forward artifacts, reliability sampling review, and an explicit expanded-corpus freeze point.
